findings.title: Navigation roots are uneven for docs and AIDE metadata
evidence: Top-level docs/ had no README.md before this audit.
Top-level .aide/ had no README.md before this audit, while .aide/commands is a major operating metadata area.
This audit adds concise top-level README pointers; a drift guard remains future work.
findings.impact: New agents and contributors can miss important operating rules or mistake dense status ledgers for navigation.
findings.recommended_next_test: Add a docs link and navigation drift guard that checks required README/index files.
findings.recommended_next_work: Add a docs link and command drift guard so the new navigation roots stay accurate.
do_not_do: Do not turn docs indexes into product claims.
Do not move runtime files as part of a docs navigation fix.

findings.title: Command metadata is manually duplicated across AIDE files and new registry
evidence: .aide/commands/dev.yaml contains a long manually maintained command list.
control/inventory/tests/test_registry.json now records a smaller canonical verification registry.
findings.impact: Commands can drift between AIDE metadata, docs, and actual scripts/tests.
findings.recommended_next_test: Add a command drift guard that checks registry commands exist and selected AIDE command ids match registry ids.
findings.recommended_next_work: Decide whether the registry becomes the source of truth for verification lanes.
blocked_by: No structured parser for existing non-JSON YAML command metadata
do_not_do: Do not replace existing AIDE metadata with generated output without a migration task.
Do not make optional Cargo commands required.

findings.title: Route and command inventories are static rather than discovery-backed
evidence: Public-alpha tests validate the inventory structure and policy posture but do not perform complete route discovery.
findings.impact: A future route could be added without being inventoried if tests do not catch it.
findings.recommended_next_test: Add route-discovery or handler-table comparison if the server route structure becomes easy to enumerate.
findings.recommended_next_work: Keep manual inventory for now and treat route discovery as a future hardening task.
blocked_by: Current stdlib server routes are not yet represented as one central route table
do_not_do: Do not redesign the web server just to satisfy inventory discovery.
Do not loosen public-alpha blocking to simplify inventory.
